stemHtml: A multi-engine aircraft that has travelled 50 NM from the departure aerodrome is cruising at FL120. The aircraft experiences an engine failure and should divert in order to land but the maximum landing mass will be exceeded by 15 000 kg. The airport elevation is 2000 ft AMSL. The pilot requests to dump fuel. ATC will…

options.a: Clear direct to airport and advise dumping on final approach.
options.b: Vector to an area where minimum 6000 ft AMSL can be maintained, or 2000 ft AGL if higher.
options.c: Instruct to hold at present position and dump fuel immediately.
options.d: Clear to any area clear of traffic regardless of altitude.
